'''''Fairfax''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] that [[Habeen]] researchers used at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shuttle [[Nexus (Lambda-class)|''Nexus'']] docked with ''Fairfax'' to finalize arrangements for completed hyperdrives and citizenship of the Habeen.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
